touches.ai_summary: LinkedIn connection request sent to Layla Nguyen, Head of Sales at NimbusConsulting. No response received.
Brief cold call with Layla Nguyen. She acknowledged challenges with forecast accuracy but mentioned they're evaluating multiple tools. Agreed to a follow-up conversation.

questions_asked.question: Are you currently facing challenges with sales forecasting at NimbusConsulting?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, our forecast accuracy has been inconsistent, especially as we've scaled to 750+ employees.

objections: We're looking at a few different solutions right now, including Fathom.
next_steps: Layla to review calendar and get back on scheduling discovery call

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up LinkedIn message sent with case study on forecast accuracy improvements. No response received.
LinkedIn message sharing relevant content on AI-powered sales analytics. No response received.
Attempted cold call to Layla Nguyen. Call went to voicemail, left brief message referencing previous conversation.
Follow-up email sent with scheduling link. Layla responded positively and booked discovery call for next week.
next_steps: Discovery call scheduled for next Tuesday at 2pm

touches.ai_summary: Discovery call with Layla Nguyen. Discussed current forecasting challenges, manual processes, and team structure. Layla mentioned she recently joined as Head of Sales and is tasked with improving forecast reliability. Expressed interest in automation capabilities but noted budget constraints.

questions_asked.question: What's your current process for generating forecasts?
questions_asked.answer: Mostly manual right now - account managers submit weekly updates in spreadsheets, I consolidate them. It's very time-consuming and prone to errors.

questions_asked.question: How many people are on your sales team?
questions_asked.answer: We have 17 people across sales and account management who would need access.

questions_asked.question: How does your pricing compare to Fathom? They quoted us significantly less.
questions_asked.answer: Our platform includes unlimited automation and advanced AI features that Fathom charges extra for. Happy to do a detailed comparison.

objections: Budget is tight this quarter - I need to make a strong case to our CEO Mia.
next_steps: Rep to send pricing comparison with Fathom
Schedule demo for Layla and 2-3 account managers

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email sent with Fathom comparison document and demo scheduling options. Layla responded asking for more details on ROI metrics.

questions_asked.question: Do you have case studies showing ROI for companies our size?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, attached three case studies from similar professional services firms showing 25-40% improvement in forecast accuracy within 6 months.

next_steps: Layla reviewing case studies with team

touches.ai_summary: Email confirming demo was well-received by account managers. Layla mentioned she needs to loop in CEO Mia Yoon and technical evaluator Jack Walsh before moving forward.
next_steps: Layla to brief Mia and Jack internally first

touches.ai_summary: Proposal call with Layla. Walked through pricing for 17 seats with unlimited automation tier. Layla expressed concern about the $12,300 ACV and asked about discount options given her limited budget as a new leader.

questions_asked.question: Is there any flexibility on pricing? This is higher than I was hoping to spend in my first quarter.
questions_asked.answer: Let me see what I can do. If you can commit to annual payment upfront, I might be able to offer a discount.

questions_asked.question: What's your timeline for making a decision?
questions_asked.answer: Ideally within the next 3 weeks - I want to show early wins to Mia.

objections: The pricing is still higher than Fathom's quote, even with your additional features.
next_steps: Rep to prepare revised proposal with discount options
Layla to get formal approval from Mia to proceed

touches.ai_summary: Second proposal call with Layla. Presented revised proposal with 31% discount to match her budget constraints. Layla appreciated the flexibility but wants to ensure Mia and Jack are aligned before proceeding. Discussed implementation timeline and support.

questions_asked.question: What does implementation look like? I can't have this disrupt the team's workflow.
questions_asked.answer: Typical implementation is 2-3 weeks with dedicated onboarding support. We'll work around your team's schedule.

questions_asked.question: Can we schedule a call with Mia and Jack to address any remaining concerns?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, let me coordinate with them. Jack will want to dig into the technical integration.

next_steps: Schedule executive meeting with Mia, Jack, and Layla
Rep to send technical documentation for Jack to review

touches.ai_summary: Pricing call with Layla to finalize contract terms. Confirmed 31.2% discount on annual plan. Discussed payment terms and start date. Layla seems eager to close but mentioned she needs final sign-off from Mia at executive meeting.

questions_asked.question: Are there any other stakeholders we need to involve before closing?
questions_asked.answer: No, just Mia's final approval. She's generally supportive but wants to meet your team herself.

next_steps: Executive meeting scheduled with Mia Yoon
Contract draft to be sent after exec meeting

touches.ai_summary: Executive meeting with CEO Mia Yoon, with Layla and Jack Walsh also present. Mia asked detailed questions about ROI, competitive differentiation from Fathom, and why the discount was necessary. She expressed some skepticism about the platform's value at the discounted price but appreciated the unlimited automation tier. Jack confirmed technical fit. Mia gave conditional approval pending legal review of contract.

questions_asked.question: If you're offering a 31% discount, does that mean the list price was inflated to begin with?
questions_asked.answer: The discount reflects the value of an upfront annual commitment and our eagerness to partner with a respected firm like NimbusConsulting.

questions_asked.question: What makes your platform worth the premium over Fathom, even at the discounted rate?
questions_asked.answer: Unlimited automation, advanced AI forecasting models, and dedicated support - features Fathom charges extra for or doesn't offer.

questions_asked.question: How quickly can we expect to see ROI?
questions_asked.answer: Most clients see measurable forecast accuracy improvements within 60-90 days based on our case studies.

objections: I'm concerned about investing heavily in a new tool when Layla just started and we're still defining our sales process.
next_steps: Implementation kickoff scheduled pending contract execution
